run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
feat(board): implement board client and session management

- Added `BoardServerClient` for interacting with the ostool-server API.
- Implemented session management with `BoardSession`, including heartbeat functionality.
- Created commands for listing available board types and running board sessions.
- Introduced a terminal interface for serial communication via WebSocket.
- Updated CLI to support new board commands and arguments.
- Added tests for the new functionality and ensured proper error handling.

run.display_title: feat(board): implement board client and session management

run.name: Quality Check

head_commit.message:
feat: add TFTP network configuration and serial port discovery

- Introduced TftpNetworkConfig to ServerConfig for managing TFTP network settings.
- Implemented automatic detection of non-loopback network interfaces.
- Added functionality to list available serial ports and network interfaces.
- Updated BoardForm and ServerView to include TFTP network settings and serial port options.
- Enhanced TFTP status to report resolved server IP and netmask.
- Updated API client and types to support new endpoints for serial ports and network interfaces.
- Added tests for new functionalities and ensured backward compatibility with existing configurations.

run.display_title: feat: add TFTP network configuration and serial port discovery
